description_long: This wardrobe consists of three separate units, each crafted from light-colored wood with a natural grain pattern. The front panels display distinct geometric designs, including chevron and rectangular motifs, adding a decorative touch to the otherwise minimalist structure. The wardrobes stand on short, sturdy legs, elevating them slightly above the ground. Each unit features double doors with subtle vertical handles integrated into the wood, maintaining a seamless appearance. The sides and back panels are plain, showcasing the same wood grain texture as the front. The overall construction suggests a robust and functional piece suitable for storage in urban environments.
description: A set of three wooden wardrobes with decorative geometric front panels and integrated vertical handles, standing on short legs. The design is minimalist yet visually striking, with natural wood grain throughout.
description_view_0: Front view showing three wardrobes with distinct geometric door patterns and integrated vertical handles.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth and thickness of the wardrobes, with plain wood grain panels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the simple, unadorned wood grain backs of the wardrobes.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain wood grain and the wardrobes' depth.
